name: D/D Savant Copernicus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>賢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>コペルニクス
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "D/D" monsters. This effect cannot be negated. Once, while this card is in your Pendulum Zone, you can negate an activated Spell effect that would inflict damage to you, then destroy this card.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card from your Deck to the GY, except "D/D Savant Copernicus". You can only use this effect of "D/D Savant Copernicus" once per turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "D/D" monsters. This effect cannot be negated. Once, while this card is in your Pendulum Zone, you can negate an activated Spell effect that would inflict damage to you, then destroy this card.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card from your Deck to the GY, except "D/D Savant Copernicus". You can only use this effect of "D/D Savant Copernicus" once per turn.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send 1 "D/D" or "Dark Contract" card from your Deck to the GY, except "D/D Savant Copernicus". You can only use this effect of "D/D Savant Copernicus" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of Spell Cards
summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
misc: Once while face-up on the field
